about.title: About the project
about.author: Author
about.subject: Subject
about.description1: Keep Track is a modern web application designed for efficient management of personal finances and budgets. The application provides a comprehensive solution for tracking income, expenses, and controlling spending through a flexible system of budgets and categories. Users can easily record transactions, organize them into custom categories, and analyze their spending via interactive charts and statistics.
about.description2: The central element of the application is the Quick Add feature, which allows users to create templates for frequently repeated transactions, speeding up recording and improving productivity. The application also offers the ability to split transactions, which is useful when sharing expenses or for more detailed analysis. All data is
about.description3: synchronized and stored on the server, allowing easy access from all your devices.
about.statsIncome: Did you know that the sum of all your positive transactions is {{income}}?
about.statsExpenses: And the sum of all negative transactions is {{expenses}}!

import.title: Import transactions from bank
import.parseError: Failed to parse CSV file. Check the format.
import.helpPrefix: 💡 Don't know how to get CSV?
import.helpText: Log in to your internet banking (not the mobile app), go to transaction history and choose Export (select CSV format separated by semicolon or comma). For example, at ČSOB you will find this option in account details.
import.uncategorizedWarning:
There are {{count}} transactions left without a selected category.

If you don't save them with a category now, they will be saved as "Unassigned".

Do you want to continue?
import.sentToAi: Sent to server for analysis. You can continue using the app.
import.timeout: Import is taking longer than expected. Please hang tight!

hero.subtitle: Fitted with a modern responsive UI, built for swift user experience, and powered by a fully fledged API. Say goodbye to clunky spreadsheets and take control of your cash flow.

about.title: Ditch the Messy Excel Spreadsheets
about.desc1: The application is for anyone who wants something more effective, visually pleasing, and functional to track their finances than Excel.
about.desc2: Are you a person who has recurring expenses and income? Would you like to keep clear track of where your money flows and what you spend the most on? Then KeepTrack was built specifically for you.
about.excelFrustrationsDesc: Manual cell formatting, broken formulas, and clunky mobile usage.
about.keepTrackSolutionDesc: Automated categorization, instant templates, and responsive analytics.

howItWorks.title: How It Works & What It’s Good For
howItWorks.subtitle: Designed from the ground up to save time on repetitive financial logging.
howItWorks.quickAddDesc: Nobody likes manually entering frequent transactions over and over. Assign a name, amount, and category to create hotbar templates for 1-click logging directly from your dashboard.
howItWorks.smartCsvDesc: Easily import your bank statements! KeepTrack uses a small model via OpenRouter to automatically assign imported transactions to your custom categories intelligently.
howItWorks.selfHostDesc: Prefer hosting your own tools? Spin up the full stack (React + NestJS + PostgreSQL) with a single Docker Compose command, and access remotely via Tailscale Funnel.

beta.title: Beta Status & Roadmap
beta.subtitle: KeepTrack is currently in active Beta development with frequent enhancements.

footer.desc: KeepTrack of your finances with a modern responsive web UI, quick transaction logging, and intelligent features.
